results.title: 无效 token 显示链接无效错误

assertions.expected: heading '链接无效' to be visible
assertions.actual: Page redirected to /sign-in — heading '登录或注册' shown instead. Share error page not rendered for unauthenticated users.

error.message: Share page /share/invalid-nonexistent-id redirects to /sign-in for unauthenticated users. The spec expects storageState cleared (no auth), but the app requires authentication to display share error pages. The '链接无效' heading was never rendered.
error.expected: heading '链接无效' visible on share error page
error.actual: Redirected to /sign-in, showing '登录或注册' heading

results.title: 链接无效页面点击返回首页导航到首页

assertions.expected: heading '链接无效' to be visible
assertions.actual: Page redirected to /sign-in — share error page not rendered for unauthenticated users

error.message: Share page /share/invalid-nonexistent-id redirects to /sign-in for unauthenticated users. Cannot verify '链接无效' heading or click '返回首页' link because the error page is never shown.
error.expected: heading '链接无效' visible, then click '返回首页' and verify URL
error.actual: Redirected to /sign-in, error page never rendered

results.title: 不存在的任务显示会话不存在错误

assertions.expected: heading '会话不存在' to be visible
assertions.actual: Page redirected to /sign-in for unauthenticated users. With auth cookies, page shows '链接无效' (invalidLink) instead of '会话不存在' (notFound) — the API returns invalidLink for non-existent share IDs rather than notFound.

error.message: Two issues: (1) Without auth (storageState cleared), share URL redirects to /sign-in — error page not rendered. (2) With auth cookies, this URL shows '链接无效' heading instead of expected '会话不存在' — the backend treats non-existent share IDs as invalid links rather than not-found.
error.expected: heading '会话不存在' visible on share error page
error.actual: Redirected to /sign-in (no auth) or shows '链接无效' (with auth)

results.title: 会话不存在页面点击返回首页导航到首页

assertions.expected: heading '会话不存在' to be visible
assertions.actual: Page redirected to /sign-in for unauthenticated users. Cannot reach the '会话不存在' error page.

error.message: Share page redirects to /sign-in for unauthenticated users. Cannot verify '会话不存在' heading or click '返回首页' link.
error.expected: heading '会话不存在' visible, then click '返回首页' and verify URL
error.actual: Redirected to /sign-in, error page never rendered
